final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a WeChat Official Account article cover about a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: premium editorial design, sophisticated luxury aesthetic, clean typography-focused layout
Composition: centered composition, title placed at visual center with balanced negative space, 16:9 aspect ratio
Subject: elegant Chinese typography "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as hero element, subtle autumn fragrance visual cues
Scene/backdrop: minimalist premium background with soft autumn-inspired gradient or texture, ample breathing room
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light, warm and refined atmosphere suggesting autumn warmth
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones balanced with muted neutrals, sophisticated and restrained
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be the dominant visual element; design must scale well for mobile reading; maintain readability at small sizes
Avoid: cluttered layout, generic stock imagery, overly decorative elements, neon colors, busy patterns
